tasks.subject: P1T1: pkg/homekit foundation — brutella/hap dep + airquality + accessory builder
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add `github.com/brutella/hap` dependency. Create `pkg/homekit/airquality.go` (VOC index → 5-level AirQuality enum) and `pkg/homekit/accessory.go` (per-Breezy accessory tree: AirPurifier + 2 Switches + sensors). Pure library, no daemon code. Both with table tests.

**Files:** Modify `go.mod`/`go.sum`/`flake.nix`. Create `pkg/homekit/{airquality,accessory}.go` + tests.

**Verify:** `go test ./pkg/homekit -v` PASS; `just check-all` exit 0.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["go.mod", "go.sum", "flake.nix", "pkg/homekit/airquality.go", "pkg/homekit/airquality_test.go", "pkg/homekit/accessory.go", "pkg/homekit/accessory_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./pkg/homekit -v && just check-all", "acceptanceCriteria": ["brutella/hap pinned in go.mod", "AirQuality boundaries 0/50/100/150/200", "NewBreezyAccessory builds AirPurifier + 2 Switch + Humidity + CO2 + AirQuality + 4 TemperatureSensor", "Accessory.Info has Vents/Twinfresh Breezy 160/deviceID", "tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: P1T2: pkg/homekit/sync.go — Status → characteristic updates
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `Sync(a *Accessory, s breezy.Status)` writes Status values into characteristics. Sentinel handling for temps; VOC→AirQuality via Task 1 helper; CarbonDioxideDetected when above threshold; AirPurifier Active/RotationSpeed/Current/Target derived from Configured + Live; Supply/Extract switches derived from airflow_mode.

**Files:** Create `pkg/homekit/sync.go` + `sync_test.go`.

**Verify:** `go test ./pkg/homekit -run TestSync -v` PASS.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pkg/homekit/sync.go", "pkg/homekit/sync_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./pkg/homekit -run TestSync -v && just check-all", "acceptanceCriteria": ["temperature sentinels skip the characteristic", "VOC index buckets via AirQuality()", "CO2Detected when eco2 > co2_threshold", "AirPurifier characteristics derived from Status", "Switch states derived from airflow_mode"]}
```

tasks.subject: P1T3: internal/config [homekit] block
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add `Homekit` struct + TOML decoding + validation + state_dir resolution (XDG/`~`).

**Files:** Modify `internal/config/{config,config_test}.go`.

**Verify:** `go test ./internal/config -v` PASS; `just check-all` exit 0.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["internal/config/config.go", "internal/config/config_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./internal/config -v && just check-all", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Homekit{Enabled, BridgeName, Port, StateDir}", "bridge_name ≤ 32 chars validation", "port 0 or 1024-65535 validation", "default bridge_name = breezyd", "default state_dir = $XDG_STATE_HOME/breezyd/homekit", "~/ expansion"]}
```

tasks.subject: P1T4: cmd/breezyd HAP server lifecycle + PIN + write callbacks + Switch mutex
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `Handler.StartHomekit(ctx, cfg, devices) → (stop, err)`. PIN auto-gen via crypto/rand (skip weak list), persist to `<state_dir>/pin.txt` mode 0600, print on every start. Build bridge + child accessories. Register HAP write callbacks per characteristic dispatching to pkg/breezy/ops via `dialRecording`. Switch mutex enforcement (Supply/Extract) in callbacks; both off → SetMode("regeneration").

**Files:** Create `cmd/breezyd/{homekit,homekit_test}.go`. Modify `cmd/breezyd/server.go` (add `homekitAccessories` field).

**Verify:** `go test ./cmd/breezyd -run TestHomekit -v` PASS for PIN tests + disabled-noop; `just check-all` exit 0.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["cmd/breezyd/homekit.go", "cmd/breezyd/homekit_test.go", "cmd/breezyd/server.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./cmd/breezyd -run TestHomekit -v && just check-all", "acceptanceCriteria": ["StartHomekit no-op when Enabled=false", "PIN generated via crypto/rand, weak list filtered, persisted to pin.txt mode 0600", "PIN reused across runs", "write callbacks registered for Active/RotationSpeed/TargetState/Supply/Extract", "Supply/Extract mutex via switchAirflow helper"]}
```

tasks.subject: P1T5: Poller OnPoll hook + main.go wiring + integration test
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add `Poller.OnPoll(name, snap)` callback fired after every successful tick. Add `Handler.SyncHomekit(name, snap)` that BuildStatus + homekit.Sync. Wire into `cmd/breezyd/main.go::run`: start HomeKit after pollers; thread OnPoll through `startPollers`. End-to-end integration test: drive a snapshot through SyncHomekit, assert HumiditySensor characteristic updated.

**Files:** Modify `cmd/breezyd/{poller,poller_test,homekit,homekit_test,main}.go`.

**Verify:** `just check-all` exit 0; `go test ./cmd/breezyd -run TestHomekit -v` PASS.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["cmd/breezyd/poller.go", "cmd/breezyd/poller_test.go", "cmd/breezyd/homekit.go", "cmd/breezyd/homekit_test.go", "cmd/breezyd/main.go"], "verifyCommand": "just check-all", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Poller.OnPoll fires only on successful ticks", "SyncHomekit no-op when device unknown or homekit disabled", "main.go starts HomeKit after pollers, defers stop", "startPollers threads OnPoll", "integration test drives a fakedevice snapshot through SyncHomekit and asserts HumiditySensor.CurrentRelativeHumidity"]}
```

tasks.subject: P1T6: NixOS module + README + CLAUDE.md + CHANGELOG
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Surface the HomeKit feature to operators and AI-assistants. NixOS module options (`services.breezyd.homekit.{enable, port, bridgeName, stateDir}`) mirror the prometheus/nginx integration shape. README HomeKit section covers enable/pair/reset. CLAUDE.md Architecture mentions the bridge as opt-in. CHANGELOG `[Unreleased]` Added entry.

**Files:** Modify `nix/module.nix`, `README.md`, `CLAUDE.md`, `CHANGELOG.md`.

**Verify:** `just check-all` exit 0; `just nix-check` exit 0; manual scan of README/CLAUDE.md.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["nix/module.nix", "README.md", "CLAUDE.md", "CHANGELOG.md"], "verifyCommand": "just check-all && just nix-check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["services.breezyd.homekit.{enable, port, bridgeName, stateDir} options", "stateDir default /var/lib/breezyd/homekit", "TOML rendering when enable=true", "openFirewall opens HK port when both enabled", "README HomeKit section with enable/pair/reset", "CLAUDE.md Architecture mention", "CHANGELOG [Unreleased] Added entry"]}
```
